pyqgis_plugin.name: RORB QGIS
pyqgis_plugin.description: View RORB results: browse .out files, plot hydrographs, export critical events
pyqgis_plugin.about: v2.4: Unified QGIS 3.x / 4.x compatibility — supports PyQt5 and PyQt6; matplotlib backend auto-selects between Qt5/Qt6; fixes Compare tab crash. v2.37: Fix AEP label for EY events; correct EY sort order. v2.36: Fix hydrograph viewer crash. v2.35: Results viewer opens as floating window by default. v2.34: Remove rainfall from hydrograph viewer. v2.33: Rainfall overlay; dockable results viewer. v2.32: Fix AttributeError on Compare tab. v2.30: Persist scenarios; rename scenario; remove Compare tab. v2.29: Rename plugin to RORB QGIS. v2.28: Zero-padded hydrographs; editable export names; .stm rainfall fallback.
